eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Kenosha, WI; at 8:30 AM on JUL 20, 2019 Effective until 8:45 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST FROM THE KENOSHA SHERIFFS DIVISION OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT. THIS IS ONLY A TEST. NO ACTION NEEDED
